{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Battle of Candle Bay
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Battle of Candle Bay]] is a name for the battle against [[Kelarac]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c26">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire events]]
